quiz.question:
It's Black to move. Black is up a pawn and an exchange. 

Which move seems to be the best strategy?

feedback.text: With the bishop on c3, Ne4, forking queen and bishop, is one of White's ideas. Bringing it back to g7 prevents any tactics.

answers.comment: bringing the bishop closer to home, because it's undefended on c3

distractors.comment: bringing the most inactive piece into the game, and offering to trade.

feedback.text: This move allows Ne4 and doesn't really threaten a strong discovered attack.

distractors.comment: setting up a discovered attack on the queen!
